summary: Near-complete incident capsule capturing the slow-query → YELLOW cluster → heap pressure → GC overhead → circuit breaker → OutOfMemoryError → node-exit → RED cluster → 503 chain; only the shard recovery and return to GREEN (lines 30-32) are missing.
improvements: Add the shard recovery and cluster-GREEN lines (30-32) as recovery-role evidence to complete the incident arc
The 'node leaving cluster' line (23) would be a stronger root_cause entry than the OOM line since it directly explains the shard-unavailability causing 503s
